name: Prashanth Palakurthi
message:
Senior Frontend Engineer with 12 years of experience designing and building high-performance, scalable user interfaces using React.js,
Next.js (SSR/SSG/ISR), and TypeScript. Deep expertise in Redux Toolkit, React Query, and D3.js for data-heavy enterprise applications.
Proven track record delivering responsive, accessible (WCAG 2.1 AA), data-driven UIs integrated with REST APIs — across global SaaS
platforms serving millions of users. Collaborative cross-functional engineer with strong alignment to backend teams, designers, and
product owners in Agile environments.
